narrative:
Van Wert County has 19,861 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.5% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.7% D−R vs -39.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
